summary: PWA Implementation Testing Complete - All features verified. Service Worker registration working, manifest.json served correctly with all icons, push notification endpoints functional, Settings > Integrations tab shows 'Your Device' section with online status and push notification controls.
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed push subscriptions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA implementation fully tested and working. Service worker registers on app load, manifest.json served with all 8 icon sizes, push notification endpoints (VAPID key, subscribe, unsubscribe, subscriptions list) all return 200. Settings > Integrations tab has 'Your Device' section with online status indicator and push notification toggle.

pwa_static_assets.manifest_json: PASS - Served correctly with name='BreezeFlow', display='standalone', 8 icon sizes
pwa_static_assets.service_worker: PASS - sw.js served correctly with caching and push notification handlers
